comment.body:
one thing to understand about geo...
Putin is a veeeery patient person. he plays the long game.
Trump is veeeery impatient, he plays the shortterm game.

Putin is clever, he knows how to manipulate, how to deal with different ppl.
Trump is an egocentric person, who forces everything.
on a person like Trump, you use inverse-psychology, reflexive control in order to get what you want... 
when you deal with such a person, it is the same thing as Gotti vs Franzese story over some company, that both had ownership in, and Franzese knew it will go bankrupt. He said to G, "i will buy you out", Gotti said immediately: "no, i will buy you out"... and thats exactly what Franzese wanted, to make Gotti a bagholder with a bankrupted company 3 months later...

So... Putin declared what he wants. And until he doesn't get it, he won't go into any agreements. okay? 
and when he said it, he meant it.
thats it.

this is all a game, sentiment, and so on...
i see not many of you have experience in high lvl negotiations

comment.body:
market is ranging for now, as expected.
can you see, how much importance some of you assign to pure noisy price action?
in speculative strategies, the key is to determine the expected underlying trend.

today, the market opened below the centroid, and my reversion target played out nicely, within a margin of error, as the low was not 71, but 89
still a ~50 pts range down.
if ranging: one day up, the next day is down... usually...
go day by day :))

hope you printed.
and if some of you feel insecure, stay on the sidelines, and wait for the clarity
